One-time purchase
$50
Instant access. No subscription required.
Continue with 2,500 credits
Credits are applied to your account immediately after purchase.
Watermark-free exports and Commercial use included

One-time credits unlock all Creator plan features.
If you are on Pro or Ultra plan, your credits carry those features as well.

How many credits do I need?
1. Set Your Song Length
03:00
Set your song duration. We support up to 20 minutes.
2. Choose Backdrop Type
Static
Animated
Choose between static images or fully animated visuals. Animated videos use more credits.
3. Choose Resolution
1080p
4K
1080p works well for social media. 4K offers the highest quality for YouTube and large screens.
Estimated Credits Needed:
310 credits*
* The final cost may vary based on the used models and features.
Credit Info
Upload a Song and Lyric Transcription
Model
	
Credits


Director Model
State-of-the-art song to lyrics transcription and story generation from your lyrics
	
1 credit per second of audio
Generate Image
Model
	
Credits


Character Model
High quality with character consistency — get the same character every time
	
3 credits per image with Pro and Ultra plans
5 credits per image with Creator and Free plans
40% off for Pro and Ultra plans


Character Plus Model
Premium
More realistic images with native 2K resolution, sharper detail, and better prompt accuracy
	
20 credits per image


Remix Model
Premium
Transform existing images by describing the changes you want
	
5 credits per image


Remix Plus Model
Premium
Edit in native 2K to keep more details, smarter prompt interpretation, and higher visual fidelity
	
20 credits per image
Convert Image to Video
Model
	
Credits


Reel Model
Good for simple scenes, camera moves, and basic animations
	
5 credits per second


Studio Model
Premium
Best for complex scenes and professional quality
	
20 credits per second


Lip Sync Model
Premium
Make your characters sing the lyrics of the song! Best results with a single, close-up character
	
15 credits per second of video
Upscale to 4K
Model
	
Credits


Image 4K Model
Premium
Upscale images with AI to 4K resolution, adding detail and sharpness
	
10 credits per image


Video 4K Model
Premium
Upscale videos with AI to 4K resolution, adding detail and sharpness
	
10 credits per second of video
Scale your roster's reach with stunning lyric videos
Enterprise
Get a quote
Contact Sales
FEATURES
Everything in Ultra
Custom credit amounts
API access
Access to a professional video editor team
our team of video editors can assist you in creating your videos
Frequently Asked Questions

Feel free to contact us for any questions or doubts.

We'll be more than happy to help you!

Is there a free trial?

Yes! When you sign up, you get free credits to create and preview videos.
To export (download) your video, you'll need to upgrade your subscription or purchase credits.

Can I just generate one video without subscription?
How do the annual plans work?
Can I purchase additional credits?
Will my unused credits roll over into the next month or billing cycle?
Do the one-time credits include all the features?
Can I cancel my subscription?
Do you offer refunds?
Do you offer discounts or promo codes?

You've finished your song.

Let people see it.
Let
